office.label: Guard the night deep block
office.detail: One problem only, ~1.5–2 hrs after dinner. Not three tasks crammed in — one. Stop by ~10:45 so the mind can come down.

office.label: Make the commute count
office.detail: Study or audio learning on the way in; decompress on the way out. Don't carry work home in your head.

office.label: Name the one outcome first
office.detail: Before Slack or email, write the single thing that must be true by tonight. Intent before the inbox sets it for you.

office.label: Take the lunch walk
office.detail: Your only daylight reset on an office day. Step out at noon — a walk and a few rounds of breathwork.

office.label: Wind down before bed
office.detail: Stop deep work ~30 min before lights out. The 7–7.5 hours of sleep is the floor everything compounds on.

home.label: Guard the morning deep block
home.detail: 9:00–11:30 with no commute eating the day — your one genuinely unbroken window. Phone away, hardest thing first.

home.label: Bank the reclaimed hours
home.detail: No commute today. Spend the saved 2–3 hrs on the study slot and a real break — not on backfilling meetings.

home.label: Name the one outcome first
home.detail: Before Slack or email, write the single thing that must be true by tonight. Intent before the inbox sets it for you.

home.label: Keep the recovery block
home.detail: You already move morning and evening — protect it. A midday walk plus breathwork keeps the afternoon from sagging.

home.label: Wind down before bed
home.detail: Stop deep work ~30 min before lights out. The 7–7.5 hours of sleep is the floor everything compounds on.
